artist_name: SANCTUM | Summer Solstice & Athena Gong KoCelebrate the energy of the Summer
Billy Cobham with the Guy Barker Big Band
A true musical alchemist mixing jazz, grime and neo-soul into a unique, signature sound.
One the most sought-after players on the London jazz scene.
Co-founders Dani Diodato and Nicola Guida surround themselves with a community of the capital's best young independent musicians.

A high-energy late-night session where London’s rising stars reimagine ‘70s jazz fusion, blending vintage influence with a modern edge through fearless improvisation, shaped by the spirit of Herbie Hancock, Miles Davis, Weather Report and beyond.
Paris-based electro-jazz quartet led by pianist Gauthier Toux blurring the lines between jazz improvisation and electronic music.
A sensational evening of live Cuban music.
